title: Infosys implements nCino Platform for ABN AMRO lending transformation
detailed_summary: Infosys announced the next phase of successful implementation and go live of the nCino Platform for ABN AMRO Bank. The project is intended to transform ABN AMRO's loan origination and collateral management processes by consolidating multiple legacy systems into a single unified platform. Infosys, described as one of ABN AMRO's primary Application Development and Maintenance partners, helped facilitate migration of over 100,000 records from multiple legacy systems over a period of 11 months. The platform is expected to improve customer onboarding, loan origination, operational efficiency, data quality, collateral management and regulatory compliance.
